steps.title: Find the key advantage in Text 1
steps.content: Text 1 establishes that standardized credits in film and television enable researchers to trace pioneering contributors' careers and accomplishments.

steps.title: Recognize the solution Text 1 describes
steps.content: The standardized crediting system in film and television creates a reliable record that prevents the exact problem video game scholars face. Choice D captures this: a widespread practice in film and television prevents the tracing difficulties that video game scholars encounter. The other options introduce elements Text 1 doesn't address—research methodology (A), different crediting purposes (B), or who relies more on credits (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
